arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca admits what he's 'not able to do' in message to angry Chelsea fans
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca is in the midst of his first season as manager at Stamford Bridge and has stuck by his philosophy despite the frustration of the Blues' fanbase

arts.ttl: Maresca insists Chelsea have made progress
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted that Chelsea have made significant progress under him despite unrest among fans. The Blues are sixth in the Premier League table with six games remaining – and very much involved in the battle for a Champions League place. And Maresca declared: “In the last two years, Chelsea have been in the […] The post Maresca insists Chelsea have made progress appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Moises Caicedo transfer stance revealed amid interest from Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Chelsea have no intention of allowing Moises Caicedo to leave in the summer transfer window, football.london understands, following reported interest from Saudi Arabia. The 23-year-old midfielder has been one of the best in his position in the Premier League this season and the Blues fully appreciate just how exceptional he is.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca insists Chelsea's improvement is "going fast", defends playing style
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca insists that his squad have been on a fast upward trajectory this season, despite currently sitting in sixth place in the Premier League table.
